name: qa
description: All-in-one QA toolkit for Claude Code — every command is prefix-free. Automation (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android: find-elements/exploratory/plan-tests/cook/run/fix/review/push-code/merge-request) AND manual QA (generate test cases to xlsx/Sheet, log-bug). Dual-purpose commands (cook/plan-tests/analyze/count-cases) auto-detect mode (automation vs manual) and platform (web/android/ios), loading only the matching skill to save tokens.
